programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart goes to Sacramento to spotlight up-and-coming comedians BT Kingsley, Ellis Rodriguez and JR De Guzman.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Russell Peters take us along as they visit Russel's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Deon Cole take us along as they visit Deon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: Women Write Now S2
programme.desc: Three short films designed to champion and elevate the voices of Black female comedy writers. Featuring the following shorts films: Hey Boo, Power Dynamics and Night Off.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: "What Now?" All Access
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Kevin Hart's 2016 record-breaking "What Now?" international stand-up tour.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: "What Now?" All Access
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Kevin Hart's 2016 record-breaking "What Now?" international stand-up tour.

programme.title: Universal Remote
programme.desc: A magical TV remote control sends Bubba and Leroy tumbling into an un-PC TV land where the channel keeps changing and the shows get more and more bizarre.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Still looking for high-wattage love, Kevin joins a celebrity online dating service. JB and Faizon Love have a physical grudge match.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: With unsolicited help from Wayne Brady, Kevin tries to rekindle the flame with Selita on Wayne's talk show.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: New celebrity "it" couple, Kevin and Selita, are crowned "Kevlita" by the media - and the buzz gets bigger when Selita reveals a baby bump. Boris prepares for the play's opening.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: A red carpet kicks off Kevin and Selita's baby shower TV special with plenty of shameless promotions and behavior by the husbands and ladies.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Tamar Braxton take us along as they visit Tamar's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Russell Peters take us along as they visit Russel's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Deon Cole take us along as they visit Deon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Gina Yashere take us along as they visit Gina's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Gina Yashere take us along as they visit Gina's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Affion Crockett take us along as they visit Crockett's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Women Write Now S2
programme.desc: Three short films designed to champion and elevate the voices of Black female comedy writers. Featuring the following shorts films: Hey Boo, Power Dynamics and Night Off.

programme.title: The Pool Boys
programme.desc: A pool boy and a gardener turn a mansion into a home for women who belong to the world's oldest profession.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: "What Now?" All Access
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Kevin Hart's 2016 record-breaking "What Now?" international stand-up tour.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to San Diego. Dustin Nickerson tells kids not to follow their dreams, Adrian "ADEE" McCovy describes an expensive first date, and Keith Johnson explains why he's the "iPhone 29 of people."

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood

programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Kevin Hart's 2016 record-breaking "What Now?" international stand-up tour.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: When Kevin Hart heads to Miami, he hits the beach before scoping out the stand-up comedy scene and introduces performances from Plus Pierre, Cisco Duran, J.B. Ball and Pam Bruno.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart visits Philadelphia and welcomes sets from TuRae Gordon, Anthony Moore, Lawrence Killebrew and Skeet Carter.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: When Kevin Hart and his crew check out the comedy scene in Birmingham, they introduce performances from Jermaine "FunnyMaine" Johnson, Rocky Dale Davis and Trey Mack.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: When Kevin Hart and his crew check out the comedy scene in Birmingham, they introduce performances from Jermaine "FunnyMaine" Johnson, Rocky Dale Davis and Trey Mack.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Gina Yashere take us along as they visit Gina's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Brandon T. Jackson take us along as they visit Brandon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: Women Write Now S2
programme.desc: Three short films designed to champion and elevate the voices of Black female comedy writers. Featuring the following shorts films: Hey Boo, Power Dynamics and Night Off.

programme.title: Universal Remote
programme.desc: A magical TV remote control sends Bubba and Leroy tumbling into an un-PC TV land where the channel keeps changing and the shows get more and more bizarre.

programme.title: Universal Remote

programme.title: Kevin Hart: "What Now?" All Access
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Kevin Hart's 2016 record-breaking "What Now?" international stand-up tour.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: After the Kevlita baby bump debacle, Selita talks to Katie Couric to get her groove and image back. Kevin tries to get Shaun Robinson to redeem his name with an exclusive, but no one's buying it.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: George Lopez approaches Kevin about starring in a cop buddy flick, "47 1/2 Hours", and convinces Kevin that the guys dropped him to save themselves.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: A furious Kevin brings a team of replacement "husbands" to the guys' pick-up game - but he gets served, literally, when they sue him for dropping out of their biopic, "Falling Legend."

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin's sabotages the political fundraiser that Kevin "promised" to host for Nick's mayoral campaign.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Nick Cannon take us along as they visit Nick's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Bill Bellamy take us along as they visit Bellamy's favorite restaurant

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Shaq take us along as they visit Shaq's favorite restaurant.

programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Jacquees take us along as they visit Jacquees' favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Women Write Now S1

programme.title: Kevin Hart: "What Now?" All Access
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at Kevin Hart's 2016 record-breaking "What Now?" international stand-up tour.

programme.title: The Pool Boys
programme.desc: A pool boy and a gardener turn a mansion into a home for women who belong to the world's oldest profession.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart explores the underground Paterson, N.J., comedy scene with some help from Cee Jay Craxx, Kendall "Shorty" Ward, Rey Gibbs and Ty Raney.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart goes to Jackson, M.S., to showcase comedy from Marvin Hunter, Rita Brent, Ben Compton and Merc B. Williams.

programme.title: FailFactory: Retirement Plan
programme.desc: This is what you call failing upwards.

programme.title: FailFactory: Fall Fashion
programme.desc: You know what they say: beauty is pain.

programme.title: FailFactory: Upward Dog, Downward Spiral
programme.desc: You're gunna need more than a yoga mat to cvehion these falls.

programme.title: FailFactory: Catastrophic Karate
programme.desc: No black belts were earned in the making of this episode.

programme.title: FailFactory: Mis-Adventures
programme.desc: These natural disasters probably could have been avoided.

programme.title: FailFactory: Fun & the Sun
programme.desc: Sunscreen won't protect you from these summer fails.

programme.title: FailFactory: Mountain Madness
programme.desc: We've reached the summit of failure with these clips.

programme.title: FailFactory: Fearless Failure
programme.desc: Bravery in the face of danger is not always rewarded.

programme.title: FailFactory: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: Keep your eyes on the road and watch out for the fails.

programme.title: FailFactory: Ouch
programme.desc: All fails are not created equal. These people got the short end of the stick with extra painful mistakes.

programme.title: FailFactory: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Read the title. This episodes is all about performers... and farts.

programme.title: FailFactory: New Year, New Me
programme.desc: A lot of pain without any gain.

programme.title: FailFactory: What's Up Dog?
programme.desc: Throw ve a bone and watch these dog fails.

programme.title: FailFactory: Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: Jvet a bunch of random nut jobs competing for dumbest fail.

programme.title: FailFactory: FelineArmy
programme.desc: This is why cats need nine lives.

programme.title: FailFactory: Celebrate Bad Times, Come On
programme.desc: An open bar can really make a party interesting.

programme.title: FailFactory: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: One positive about being bald is that you won't end up in this episode.

programme.title: FailFactory: Old McFailArmy
programme.desc: Farm-to-table fails becavee you deserve the best.

programme.title: FailFactory: The Grass is Always Greener
programme.desc: Don't be fooled, grass is not padding.

programme.title: FailFactory: I Hurt Myself Today
programme.desc: This pain doesn't seem like it led to any gain.

programme.title: FailFactory: Tony Hawk's Pro Hater
programme.desc: Skateboarding and gnarly fails go hand in hand.

programme.title: FailFactory: Family Fued
programme.desc: Every family member has their flaws. We put them on display in this episode.

programme.title: FailFactory: Take Me Home
programme.desc: Your home is supposed to be a safe space. Don't tell that to these people.

programme.title: FailFactory: FallArmy
programme.desc: A lot of fails end with a fall, but these falls are extra special...and painful.

programme.title: FailFactory: Odd Balls
programme.desc: Sports are 90% mental. The other half are fails.

programme.title: FailFactory: Chill Out
programme.desc: Need more excvees to stay inside during the winter?

programme.title: FailFactory: Wheels Go 'Round
programme.desc: Well that took a painful turn.

programme.title: FailFactory: Challenge Accepted
programme.desc: One day they'll win, right?

programme.title: FailFactory: Mo Money Mo Fails
programme.desc: This is why we can't have nice things.

programme.title: FailFactory: 9 to Fail
programme.desc: We might need HR for this one.

programme.title: FailFactory: Ruff Stuff
programme.desc: Some dogs are smart! Others, are these dogs.

programme.title: FailFactory: Oops!... I Did It Again
programme.desc: The writing on the wall mvet have been in another language.

programme.title: FailFactory: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: No height restrictions on this wild ride.

programme.title: FailFactory: Surfs Down Bro
programme.desc: A bad day on the water is better than a good day at work.

programme.title: FailFactory: Man Vs. Nature
programme.desc: SPOILER ALERT: Nature wins.

programme.title: Frasier: Goodnight Seattle (Part 1)
programme.desc: Både personligt og professionelt er Frasiers liv ved at ændre sig for altid.

programme.title: Frasier: Goodnight Seattle (Part 2)
programme.desc: Frasier tager en beslutning, der ændrer hans liv for altid.

programme.title: Frasier: The Good Son (Pilot)
programme.desc: Psykiateren Frasier Crane vender tilbage til sin fødeby Seattle for at være vært på et radiotalkshow, men opdager snart, at han selv har brug for en psykiater, da hans handicappede far flytter ind.

programme.title: Frasier: Space Quest
programme.desc: Frasier er træt af manglen på privatliv både derhjemme og på jobbet, beslutter det er tid til, at faderen flytter ud.

programme.title: Frasier: Dinner At Eight
programme.desc: Det er et kulturet kultursammenstød, da Frasier og Niles mødes med deres far til en middag på hans yndlingsrestaurant.

programme.title: Frasier: I Hate Frasier Crane
programme.desc: Efter at have udvekslet spydigheder med en avisskribent lader Frasier sig udfordre til at deltage i sin første slåskamp.

programme.title: Frasier: Here's Looking At You
programme.desc: Frasier leger Kirsten Giftekniv for sin far og den eftertragtede ungkarl Martin, og spionerer gennem sit teleskop.

programme.title: Frasier: The Crucible
programme.desc: Frasier konfronteres met et personligt og professionelt dilemma, da han begynder at date ekskæresten til en lytterne til hans radioprogram.

programme.title: Frasier: Call Me Irresponsible
programme.desc: Frasier konfronteres met et personligt og professionelt dilemma, da han begynder at date ekskæresten til en lytterne til hans radioprogram.

programme.title: Frasier: Beloved Infidel
programme.desc: Da Frasier og Niles ser deres far spise middag med en gammel ven af familien, konkluderer de, at Martin engang havde en affære med den kvinde.

programme.title: Frasier: Selling Out
programme.desc: Da Frasier lokkes ind i et live støtteprogram, kommer hans professionelle troværdighed under beskydning.

programme.title: Frasier: Oops
programme.desc: Da Frasier bidraget til rygtespredning, er han skyld i, at Bulldog mister sit job.

programme.title: Frasier: Death Becomes Him
programme.desc: Da en tilsyneladende sund kollega dør uventet, bliver Frasier besat af sin egen dødelighed.

programme.title: Frasier: Miracle On Third Or Fourth Street
programme.desc: Da sønnen ikke kan holde juleferie sammen med ham, lærer en melankolsk Frasier julens sande ånd at kende fra en gruppe fremmede.

programme.title: Frasier: Guess Who's Coming To Breakfast?
programme.desc: Martin bliver rasende på Frasier, da han afslører hemmelighederne i sin fars kærlighedsliv i radioprogrammet.

programme.title: Frasier: Can't Buy Me Love
programme.desc: Frasier glæder sig til en hot date med en smuk model, som 'købte' ham på en ungkarleauktion for berømtheder.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can't Tell A Crook By His Cover
programme.desc: Efter Frasier påstår at kunne udpege kriminelle i en menneskemængde, udfordrer Martin ham til at identificere eksfangen i sin pokergruppe.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Lilith Comes Back
programme.desc: Efter at have fundet et forsoningsbrev fra Frasier, der længe har været væk, kommer Lilith til Seattle og forsøger at genoptage deres forhold.

programme.title: Frasier: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: Niles står over for den ultimative fristelse, da Daphne er fanget i hans hjem under en voldsom storm.

programme.title: Frasier: And The Whimper Is
programme.desc: Da Frasiers program nomineres til en lokal radioprogrampris, foreslår Ro, at de 'overtaler' juryen ved at bearbejde dem med gaver.

programme.title: Frasier: Give Him The Chair
programme.desc: Frasier lærer, at følelser er vigtigere end stil, efter han ved et uheld mister sin fars gamle lænestol.

programme.title: Frasier: Fortysomething
programme.desc: I panik over at blive ældre, søger Frasier trøst i jagten på en køn ung kvinde, der viser sin interesse i ham.

programme.title: Frasier: Travels With Martin
programme.desc: Frasiers forsøg på at lave en far-søn-ferie bliver til en skrækkelig køretur, da Niles og Daphne tager med på turen.

programme.title: Frasier: Author Author
programme.desc: Frasier og Niles forsøger at arbejde sammen om at skrive en bog, men ender med at skændes mere end at skrive.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Crane's Day Off
programme.desc: Frasier har fått influensan. Han stannar hemma från jobbet, men blir alltmer paranoid då han tror att alla, inklusive Niles, vill ta över hans radioprogram.

programme.title: Frasier: My Coffee With Niles
programme.desc: Da Niles spørger Frasier, om han er lykkelig efter hans første år tilbage i Seattle, åbner spørgsmålet op for en komisk og afslørende familiedialog.

programme.title: Frasier: Slow Tango In South Seattle
programme.desc: Frasier opdager, at en lummer bestseller var baseret på hans affære med en ældre kvinde.

programme.title: Frasier: The Unkindest Cut Of All
programme.desc: Efter Eddie bliver far til et kuld uægte hundehvalpe, går Frasier bag om ryggen på Martin for at få hunden kastreret.

programme.title: Frasier: Duke's, We Hardly Knew Ye
programme.desc: Frasier og Niles er ophidsede over at finde ud af, at deres investorer i firmaet planlagde at nedrive deres fars yndlingstilholdssted.

programme.title: Frasier: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Frasiers plan om at 'parre' Daphne med sin nye chef går skævt, da Frasier hører om hans hemmelighed.

programme.title: Frasier: Flour Child
programme.desc: Efter at have set en kvinde føde, beslutter Niles, at det er på tide at øve sig i forældrefærdigheder - på en sæk mel!

programme.title: Frasier: The Botched Language of Cranes
programme.desc: Frasier begår en fejl, som ødelægger hans image i en live sending, og han forsøger at rette op på fejlen ved at arrangere forskellige velgørenhedsevents.

programme.title: Frasier: The Candidate
programme.desc: Efter Martin annoncerer sin støtte til en radikal politisk kandidat, beslutter Frasier og Niles sig for at bakke hovedmodstanderen op.

programme.title: Frasier: Adventures In Paradise (Part 1)
programme.desc: Frasiers spirende forhold testes, da han støder ind i sin ekskone, Lilith, under en ferie med sin nye kærlighed.

programme.title: Frasier: Adventures In Paradise (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jalousien viser sit grimme ansigt, da Frasier støder ind i Lilith og hendes nye kæreste på en ferie med sin egen nye kæreste.

programme.title: Frasier: Burying A Grudge
programme.desc: Martin synes, det er svært at 'tilgive og glemme', da han løber ind i en tidligere politikammerat, der er ligger på hospitalet.

programme.title: Frasier: Seat Of Power
programme.desc: Frasier og Niles konfronterer bøllerne, som plejede at plage dem i folkeskolen.
